name: search-crawler
description: On-demand crawler that builds the static external search index (search-external.json) for ranzlappen.com. Dependency-free (Node 22 built-ins only).

scripts.lint: node --check crawl.mjs && node --check sources.config.js && node --check src/util.mjs && node --check src/extract.mjs && node --check src/web.mjs && node --check src/github.mjs
